name: Taiwan Strait Escalation
description: Military tensions spike in the Taiwan Strait, threatening semiconductor supply from TSMC and other Taiwanese manufacturers.

name: Port Strike in China
description: Labor disputes halt major Chinese export ports, delaying shipments across all Asia-sourced components.

name: Monsoon Season Disruption
description: Seasonal heavy rainfall floods logistics routes and factory floors across East and Southeast Asia.

name: Semiconductor Tariffs
description: New US-China trade restrictions impose 15% tariffs on semiconductor imports from Asia.
